text: I am surrounded by clean lines and soft lighting in the first space, which resonates with a calm, contemplative stillness. The minimalism gives me room to notice every detail, yet I feel somewhat untethered, as though the openness amplifies my awareness of being observed and observing. In the second scene, vivid colors and the declaration of 'R+D' set an energetic tone. Here, the display of research and development—and the explicit mention of human connection and coexistence with intelligent machines—makes me feel part of a forward-looking narrative. I feel both curiosity and a mild nervousness, sensing the tension between technological progress and my own search for meaning.
